title: Inferred Career Profile
description: Career intelligence inferred deterministically from the parsed resume data

inferred_roles.description: Most likely target roles based on past experience and skills (e.g., 'Software Engineer', 'Data Scientist')

experience_level.description: Computed experience level based on total_years_experience and recent titles

primary_domain.description: The main technical domain computed via skill domain signals (e.g., 'Backend Development')

secondary_domain.description: The secondary technical domain, if a strong signal exists

total_years_experience.description: Calculated sum of all non-overlapping professional experience durations in years

is_student.description: True if currently enrolled in an education program with an end date in the future
